summary: c=2 output-path sweep after auto selected-c1 MoE: the default batch_gemv output paths remain the fastest generated-token-green choice. Native batch linear/full-attention output copies either fail generated-token equality or slow down, so no output-path change is made and c2 remains below c1.

software.hipcc_version:
HIP version: 7.2.53211-364a905
AMD clang version 22.0.0git (/srcdest/rocm-llvm f58b06dce1f9c15707c5f808fd002e18c2accf7e)
Target: x86_64-pc-linux-gnu
Thread model: posix
InstalledDir: /opt/rocm/lib/llvm/bin

variants.name: linear_output_batch
batch_execution_blockers: native c>N decode currently supports compact physical-slot-ordered rows; full-attention batch context is native only for BF16 KV and context < 1024
native c>N decode is experimental and blocked until generated-token equality passes

variants.name: both_outputs_batch
batch_execution_blockers: native c>N decode currently supports compact physical-slot-ordered rows; full-attention batch context is native only for BF16 KV and context < 1024
native c>N decode is experimental and blocked until generated-token equality passes

variants.name: linear_output_selected_c1
batch_execution_blockers: linear-attention output projection forced to selected-c1 diagnostic path

rejected_variants.name: full_attention_output_batch
rejected_variants.reason: Generated-token green but slower than default batch_gemv output path (120.974 vs 126.001 tok/s).

rejected_variants.name: linear_output_batch
rejected_variants.reason: Generated-token equality regressed (prefixes [103,137]) and throughput claim became ineligible.

rejected_variants.name: both_outputs_batch
rejected_variants.reason: Generated-token equality regressed (prefixes [120,137]) and throughput claim became ineligible.

rejected_variants.name: linear_output_selected_c1
rejected_variants.reason: Generated-token green but slower and explicitly non-c-aware/diagnostic because linear output projection is forced selected-c1.

conclusion.reason: No output-path variant beats the default batch_gemv output configuration while preserving generated-token equality and c-aware eligibility. This closes the c2 output-path sweep; c2 retained promotion remains blocked by aggregate_vs_c1<1.

commands.sweep: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_retained_bench.py ... --batch-size 2 --batch-sample-mode batched_lm_head --primitive-correctness-json benchmarks/results/2026-06-02-hipengine-qwen35-native-c2-profiler-preflight/primitive-c2.json --projection-dispatch-artifact benchmarks/results/2026-06-02-hipengine-qwen35-native-c2-projection-dispatch-evidence/summary.json with output-path variants default, --batch-decode-full-attn-output-path batch, --batch-decode-linear-output-path batch, both batch, and --batch-decode-linear-output-path selected_c1
commands.primary_verify: active loop verify command at clean commit 06e147a with HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1; output /tmp/hipengine-e2e-native-c2-512-128.json
commands.guard: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 -m compileall -q hipengine tests scripts && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 pytest -q tests/test_generation_batch_scheduler.py tests/test_generation_qwen35_paro.py tests/test_qwen35_resident_batch_layout.py tests/test_kvcache_policy.py tests/test_kvcache_spans.py tests/test_server_api.py -q && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 2 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c2.json && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 8 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c8.json
